escalateWhen: verifyBeforeNext command fails twice on the same item after one Composer fix attempt
item touches functions/src/, firestore.rules, or pickup/delivery CF eligibility logic (run Sonnet 4.6 security review Task before push)
item tier is T2+ and changes auth, Firestore writes, or transaction/idempotency behavior
acceptance criteria cannot be met without schema or rules change not listed in item scope — mark blocked, do not widen scope
executionProtocol.instructions: Follow PROJECT_STATUS/AWAY_BUILD_PROTOCOL.md. After each item: npm run away:ship -- --id <id> --note "..." then npm run away:validate.

queue.title: Phase 5: email parser fixture gate (offline prototype)
queue.scope: Per svscope §5 + roadmap Phase 5: offline sample emails only — no live inbox, no readiness writes. Fixtures on disk today: Johnstone + First Supply only (roadmap also names Ferguson — away-043 adds it; Ferguson fixtures do not exist yet). Run npm run test:email-parser on approved fixtures; fix parser/matcher regressions if any; document pass/fail in away-status note. Do NOT add Gmail/live monitoring (Phase 6). Minew ESL and shop map blockers do not apply to this item.
queue.acceptance: npm run test:email-parser exit 0; npm run build clean; no operational Firestore writes from email path.
queue.capturedDuring: Dan 2026-06-18 — post batch-3 memory consolidation; Phase 5 entry

queue.title: Phase 5: fixture accuracy report (≥95% gate)
queue.scope: Extend scripts/test-email-parser.mjs to emit per-fixture pass/fail and aggregate accuracy score. Document the ≥95% gate scoring method from roadmap Phase 5 (approved sample set, defined scoring). Offline only — no Firestore writes. Report must be visible in test output or structured summary; do not auto-apply updates.
queue.acceptance: Per-fixture pass/fail + aggregate score printed; ≥95% gate method documented in test output or comment; npm run test:email-parser exit 0; npm run build clean.

queue.title: Phase 5: read-only proposed email updates panel

Email types only — no apply button, no readiness writes, no Firestore mutations from email path. Align to svscope §5: AI may propose, not update operational records.
queue.acceptance: Dispatcher shows proposed email updates from fixtures (read-only); npm run build clean; npm run verify:dispatcher-nav PASS; no apply/readiness writes.
